entry.content: On Monday we reviewed the Atlas architecture and retrieval boundary.

scripted_episode.title: Reviewed Atlas architecture
scripted_episode.narrative: The team reviewed the Atlas architecture and retrieval boundary on Monday. The discussion focused on the current design.

entry.content: On Friday we reviewed the Atlas architecture again after the retrieval changes landed.

scripted_episode.title: Reviewed Atlas architecture
scripted_episode.narrative: The team reviewed the Atlas architecture again on Friday after the retrieval changes landed. This was a later check-in, not the original review.
